overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek running through a vast desert landscape at night. The character travels from an area with rocky outcrops toward a distant oasis, with the camera following steadily from behind.

agents.ego_description: Bayek running steadily through the desert with shield, bow, and sword equipped, heading away from the rocky outcrop

entered.detail: large sandstone cliff formation rising from the desert floor
rolling sand dunes stretching across the desert floor
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds and visible stars

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the desert night with a large rocky cliff formation visible to the right. The landscape is vast and empty, with sand dunes stretching to the horizon under a dark starry sky.

events.description: rocky cliff formation passes out of view behind the character, leaving only open desert

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the open desert toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: silhouetted rock formations visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rocky cliffs, the character now runs through completely open desert. Distant rock formations appear on the horizon ahead as the journey continues across the empty sands.

events.description: distant oasis water and ancient ruins become visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: running toward the distant oasis and ancient structures now visible on the horizon

entered.detail: reflective water surface of a distant oasis visible on the horizon
ancient stone structures and monuments near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distant oasis where water and ancient ruins become visible on the horizon. The desert remains vast and empty as the destination comes into view under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast desert night that transitions from a rugged cliffside into an open expanse leading toward a distant oasis. It begins with the character running past a large rocky cliff formation on the right, with empty sand dunes stretching toward a dark, starry horizon. As the cliffs recede, the landscape opens into a completely unobstructed desert where only distant rock formations break the flat line of the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character pushes further into the emptiness, gradually bringing a remote oasis with shimmering water and ancient ruins into view. Finally, the camera maintains its steady pursuit as the destination becomes clear against the backdrop of the nocturnal wilderness.
